_comment: MoxRelay source config (M2.2). Each entry: a registered libobs input id, a display name (also the {source} segment of the Spout sender name), and a 'settings' object passed verbatim as the source's obs_data settings. A monitor_capture entry without an explicit monitor_id is seeded with the primary display. The optional 'format' key selects the Spout sender pixel format -- srgb87 (default; sRGB-encoded bytes), linear87 (linear bytes, for receivers that perform no sRGB decode), or fp16 (linear half-float HDR). Full config management/persistence arrives in M6.
